title: Force Majeure — 3-Tier Cost Allocation (Non-Political / Indirect Political / Political)
text_english: FORCE MAJEURE COSTS — ALLOCATION: (i) NON-POLITICAL EVENT — each PARTY BEARS its own FM costs; neither shall reimburse the other; (ii) INDIRECT POLITICAL EVENT — ALL FM costs NOT EXCEEDING the INSURANCE COVER shall be BORNE by the CONTRACTOR; to the extent FM costs EXCEED Insurance Cover, ONE-HALF of the EXCESS shall be REIMBURSED by the AUTHORITY to the Contractor; (iii) POLITICAL EVENT — ALL FM costs SHALL be REIMBURSED by the AUTHORITY to the Contractor. TERMINATION TRIGGER: If FM subsists for {{fm_subsist_days}} (default 60) DAYS within a continuous period of {{fm_window_days}} (default 120) DAYS, EITHER PARTY may TERMINATE the Agreement after notifying the other and granting {{fm_representation_days}} (default 15) days for representation. FM REPORTING: Affected Party SHALL NOTIFY within {{fm_notice_days}} (default 10) days of occurrence with full particulars (nature, evidence, estimated duration, mitigation measures).
